violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the ice machine located in the bar needs to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the cappuccino machine needs to be cleaned Underneath the fryers need to be cleaned.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Boxes of single use items on the floor in the dry storage area.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. The doorway between the kitchen and the back bar area is bare wood.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Wet mop sitting in the bucket and not hung properly to dry.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)

Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
